name: Dream Golf VR
short_description: Looking for a mini golf experience that'll remind you of the real thing? Look no further!!! Download FREE today!
detailed_description:
Dream Golf VR features TWO full 18 hole mini golf courses, a total of 36 holes, for one to enjoy in VR. The use of vibrant colors and serene landscapes help give the user a pleasant experience. Once the game is started, the player can select a ball color, change the length of their club, and choose from several soundtracks to accompany their game. Each hole features a sign on post that keeps track of the player's score. For even more fun, 4 additional courses are available as DLC!

List of game features:

Glow Golf
- With the flip of a switch, play a night game of glow golf!

Arcade Mode
- New traps, obstacles, penalties, and rewards await with this game mode. Try it out with "glow golf" enabled for a new flair!

Hard Mode
- Up for a more difficult challenge? This mode contains additional holes you want to avoid. Sinking the ball in one of these will add a stroke!

Easy Mode
- Looking for a very casual experience? The ball gravitates towards the hole when in close proximity!

Practice Mode
- Play any hole as many times as you like!

Local high scores
- Keep track of your best games with these high score boards.

Steam achievements
- Achievements for acing each hole on regular & hard mode.

Steam Leaderboards
- A variety of Leaderboards have been added for the competitive ones out there!

Enjoy!
